overrides.expect: \Gamma_ {\mathfrak {p}} (\mathbf {s} _ {\mathfrak {p}}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \Gamma (\mathbf {s} _ {\mathfrak {p}}), & \text {if \mathfrak {p} real}, \\ 2 ^ {1 - T r (\mathbf {s} _ {\mathfrak {p}})} \Gamma (T r (\mathbf {s} _ {\mathfrak {p}})), & \text {if \mathfrak {p} complex}, \end{array} \right.
\sum_ {\chi} \chi (a ^ {- 1} b) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \text {if a\neq b ,} \\ \varphi (m) = \# (\mathbb {Z} / m \mathbb {Z}) ^ {*}, & \text {if a = b .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \sum_{\chi} \chi(a^{-1} b) = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} 0, & \text{if } a\neq b, \\ \varphi(m) = \#(\mathbb{Z} / m \mathbb{Z})^{*}, & \text{if } a = b. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \mathcal {L} _ {\mathfrak {p}} (L | K, \chi , s) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} L _ {\mathbb {C}} (s) ^ {\chi (1)}, & \text {if \mathfrak {p} is complex}, \\ L _ {\mathbb {R}} (s) ^ {n ^ {+}} L _ {\mathbb {R}} (s + 1) ^ {n ^ {-}}, & \text {if \mathfrak {p} is real}, \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \mathcal{L}_{\mathfrak{p}}(L | K, \chi, s) = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} L_{\mathbb{C}}(s)^{\chi(1)}, & \text{if } \mathfrak{p}\ \text{is complex}, \\ L_{\mathbb{R}}(s)^{n^{+}} L_{\mathbb{R}}(s + 1)^{n^{-}}, & \text{if } \mathfrak{p}\ \text{is real}, \end{array} \right.
